name: Kisaragi Station
short_description: In this spine-chilling indie horror game, you must navigate through a landscape teetering on the edge of reality and nightmare, in a race against time to rescue your sister, Kioko, from the clutches of the malevolent Akumu. Will you prevail?
detailed_description:
RPG One Player game with turn based battle system.

In this spine-chilling indie horror game, players will step into the shoes of Hasumi, a brave and determined protagonist lost in the eerie and enigmatic world of Limbo. In a race against time to rescue your sister, Kioko, from the clutches of the malevolent Akumu, you will encounter and help other lost souls while engaging in turn-based battles with the Shinigami who lurk in Limbo. 

Collect amulets and objects to use in battle while helping other lost souls move on.

Will you prevail?
